LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER NIKOLA FARATS' AMENDED VERIFIED PETITION FOR ISSUANCE OF A WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE TO THE D. M. V. SETTING ASIDE THE SUSPENSION AND NOTIFICATION OF FINDINGS AND DECISION OF DEC 8, 2006. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE EVIDENCE IS INSUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT PETITIONER WAS DRIVING A VEHICLE UNDER THE INFLUENCE OF ALCOHOL. THE COURT WILL ISSUE A STATEMENT OF DECISION. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR 4780

MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER NIKOLA FARATS' AMENDED VERIFIED PETITION FOR ISSUANCE OF A WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE TO THE D. M. V. SETTING ASIDE THE SUSPENSION AND NOTIFICATION OF FINDINGS AND DECISION OF DEC 8, 2006.
APPEARANCES: LAWRENCE D. MURRAY, ESQUIRE (MURRAY & ASSOCIATES, 415.673.0555) APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER. COURTNEY S. LUI, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL (DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE, 510.622.2115) APPEARING FOR RESPONDENT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE EVIDENCE IS INSUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT PETITIONER WAS DRIVING A VEHICLE UNDER THE INFLUENCE OF ALCOHOL. COURT WILL ISSUE A STATEMENT OF DECISION. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR 4780
